name: Vanilla Fudge with Variations
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch square or 13x9-inch pan with foil extending over the sides of the pan; butter the foil.
2. In a large saucepan, combine sugar, margarine, and milk. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
3. Continue boiling for 5 minutes over medium heat, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat and add marshmallow cream and almond bark. Blend until smooth.
5. Stir in walnuts and vanilla. Pour into the prepared pan.
6. Cool to room temperature.
7. Score fudge into 36 or 48 squares.
8. Refrigerate until firm.
9. Remove fudge from the pan by lifting the foil; remove foil from fudge.
10. Using a large knife, cut through the scored lines.
11. Store in refrigerator.
Eggnog Fudge: Substitute 2/3 cup eggnog for evaporated milk and 1/2 to 1 teaspoon rum extract for vanilla.
Peanut Butter Fudge: Decrease almond bark to 6 ounces. Add 1/2 cup peanut butter with marshmallow cream and almond bark. Substitute 3/4 cup chopped dry roasted peanuts for walnuts.
Christmas Fudge: Substitute 1/2 cup chopped almonds for walnuts and 1/4 teaspoon almond extract for vanilla. Stir in 1/2 cup chopped dates and 1/2 cup chopped red candied cherries with almonds and almond extract.
Peppermint Candy Fudge: Omit vanilla. Substitute 1/2 cup finely crushed peppermint candy for walnuts and add desired amount of red food coloring.
